chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. S-1140 of 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Case 1. For order on CMA No.835/24( Urgent if granted) 2. For order on CMA No. 836/2024 (Limitation) 3. For order on CMA No. 837/2024 (U/s 114 CPC R/W 151 CPC) 4. For order on CMA NO. 838/2024 (151 CPC For Suspension/Modifying) 15.01.2024 Mr. Javed Akhtar Rind advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Dapar, Assistant Advocate General Complainant/Petitioner present Mr. Qaim Ali Memon advocate for respondent Nos. 7,8,10 and 13. Inspector Abdul Sattar Magsi Ex. SHO Mubina Town, LHC Zamira Thebo and Mst. Rabia are present. ------------------ This petition was disposed of vide order dated 22.11.2023 with direction to the DIGP East to hear the parties and if he finds a cognizable offence committed by the police officials then appropriate direction may be issued against the delinquent police officials. Learned counsel for the respondents Nos. 7,8,10 and 13 has filed application under section 114 CPC for reviewing the order dated 22.11.2023 passed by this Court on the premise that the parties have patched up outside the Court and have no further grievance against each other. Complainant, who is present in person has endorsed the view point of the police officials. Learned AAG has no objection if the review application may be disposed of with direction to DIGP East to drop the disciplinary proceedings against the police officials as directed by this Court. I have heard the learned counsel for the parties on the listed application and have perused the material available on record.

Learned AAG has no objection if the review application may be disposed of with direction to DIGP East to drop the disciplinary proceedings against the police officials as directed by this Court. I have heard the learned counsel for the parties on the listed application and have perused the material available on record. Since the complainant is no more interested to take the matter to its logical conclusion against the delinquent police officials, therefore, this Court will not travel into the dispute arising out of disciplinary proceedings in a disposed of matter, as such no further action is required. The listed application(s) are disposed of in the above terms. Shafi JUDGE
